---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem description

What problem does this feature solve? Who encounters it and when?

Example: "When searching a monorepo with 500+ files, results from test
directories overwhelm results from source files with no way to filter."

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be specific about the interface — CLI flags,
config keys, output format changes, etc.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you prefer this one?
If you tried a workaround, describe it here.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links to related issues, prior art in similar tools, or anything
else that helps evaluate the proposal.
